name: Bemdaneprocel
summary: Human embryonic stem cell-derived dopaminergic neuron progenitor therapy tracked as a disease-specific stem-cell replacement program in Parkinson disease.
mechanism_summary: Uses transplanted dopaminergic neuron progenitors intended to replace lost nigrostriatal dopaminergic function after stereotactic grafting into the putamen.

open_questions: Whether sham-controlled phase 3 testing confirms motor benefit and durability
Whether graft survival and function can be balanced against surgical and immunosuppression risks
Whether disease-specific neuronal replacement informs broader stem-cell exhaustion forecasts
